label: Food & Beverage
description: Industry archetype for food manufacturers, beverage companies, grocery retailers, and FMCG distributors. Includes product types for packaged food, beverages, and fresh produce with nutrition-focused attributes (calories, allergens, ingredients), cold chain logistics, GS1 barcode configuration, and regulatory compliance for food safety standards (HACCP, FDA, EU 1169/2011).

attribute_groups.description: Nutritional information: calories, macronutrients, vitamins, and dietary facts
Ingredients list, allergen declarations, and dietary classifications
Storage temperature, shelf life, cold chain requirements, and handling instructions
GS1 identifiers, GTIN codes, barcode formats, and trade item data

attribute_types.validation_message: Temperature range must be in format: min to max (e.g., 2°C to 8°C)

attributes.description: Energy content per serving in kilocalories (kcal)
Reference serving size for nutritional values (e.g., 100g, 250ml, 1 slice)
Total fat content per serving in grams
Saturated fat content per serving in grams
Total carbohydrate content per serving in grams
Total sugar content per serving in grams
Protein content per serving in grams
Sodium content per serving in milligrams
Dietary fiber content per serving in grams
Full ingredients list in descending order of weight, with allergens emphasized

attributes.options: Gluten, Milk, Eggs, Fish, Crustaceans, Molluscs, Tree Nuts, Peanuts, Soy, Sesame, Celery, Mustard, Lupin, Sulphites
attributes.description: Allergens present in the product per EU Regulation 1169/2011 (Annex II) and FDA major allergens

attributes.options: Gluten, Milk, Eggs, Fish, Crustaceans, Molluscs, Tree Nuts, Peanuts, Soy, Sesame, Celery, Mustard, Lupin, Sulphites
attributes.description: Precautionary allergen warnings for cross-contamination risks (may contain traces of)

attributes.options: Vegetarian, Vegan, Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free, Nut-Free, Kosher, Halal, Organic, Sugar-Free, Low-Sodium, Keto-Friendly, Paleo
attributes.description: Dietary suitability classifications and lifestyle certifications
Food additives, preservatives, and E-numbers (e.g., E300, E330)
Total shelf life in days from production date
Required storage temperature range (e.g., 2-8°C, Below -18°C, Ambient)

attributes.options: Ambient, Chilled (0-5°C), Refrigerated (2-8°C), Frozen (-18°C), Deep Frozen (-25°C), Controlled Room Temperature (15-25°C)
attributes.description: Storage classification for cold chain management and warehouse zoning
Shelf life in days after opening or breaking the seal

attributes.options: Best Before, Use By, Sell By, Expiration Date, Production Date
attributes.description: Type of date marking on the product per food safety regulations
Whether the product requires unbroken cold chain during transport and storage
Global Trade Item Number (GTIN-8, GTIN-12, GTIN-13, or GTIN-14)
GS1 company prefix assigned by the local GS1 Member Organization

attributes.options: EAN-13, EAN-8, UPC-A, UPC-E, ITF-14, GS1-128, GS1 DataBar, GS1 DataMatrix, QR Code
attributes.description: Primary barcode symbology used on the product packaging
Net content/quantity declaration (e.g., 500g, 1L, 6 pack x 330ml)
Alcohol by volume percentage for beverages

attributes.options: HACCP, ISO 22000, BRC, IFS, FSSC 22000, SQF, GlobalG.A.P., Organic (EU), USDA Organic, Fair Trade, Rainforest Alliance, UTZ
attributes.description: Food safety and sustainability certifications
Country or region where the food was produced or processed
Product flavor or taste variant (e.g., Strawberry, Original, Spicy BBQ)

product_types.description: Pre-packaged food products with defined shelf life, nutritional labeling, and ingredient declarations. Includes snacks, canned goods, cereals, sauces, condiments, and ready meals. Supports Flavor/Size variant axes.
Drinks and liquid products including water, juices, sodas, dairy drinks, teas, coffees, and alcoholic beverages. Supports Flavor/Size variant axes with alcohol content tracking.
Fresh fruits, vegetables, herbs, and unprocessed agricultural products. Short shelf life with strict cold chain requirements. Typically sold by weight with minimal packaging.
Refrigerated dairy products, deli items, fresh meats, and chilled prepared foods. Requires cold chain logistics and short-dated inventory management.
Deep-frozen food products including frozen meals, ice cream, frozen vegetables, and frozen proteins. Requires -18°C or below storage throughout the supply chain.

quality_rules.message: Food products must have a complete ingredients list
quality_rules.description: Ingredients list is legally required by EU 1169/2011 and FDA food labeling regulations

quality_rules.message: Food products must declare all allergens present
quality_rules.description: Allergen declaration is mandatory per EU Annex II and FDA FALCPA. Missing allergen info is a safety and recall risk.

quality_rules.message: Food products must specify shelf life in days
quality_rules.description: Shelf life is essential for inventory rotation (FIFO/FEFO), date marking, and food safety compliance

quality_rules.message: Food products must specify storage temperature requirements
quality_rules.description: Storage temperature is critical for food safety, cold chain logistics, and warehouse management

quality_rules.message: Packaged food should include calorie information per serving
quality_rules.description: Calorie declaration is part of mandatory nutritional labeling in most jurisdictions

quality_rules.message: Food products must declare net content (weight or volume)
quality_rules.description: Net content declaration is legally required on all pre-packaged food products

quality_rules.message: Adding dietary classifications improves product discoverability for health-conscious consumers
quality_rules.description: Dietary tags like Vegan, Gluten-Free, Organic help consumers find suitable products

quality_rules.message: Products should have a GTIN (barcode) for retail and supply chain integration
quality_rules.description: GTIN is required for retail listing, GS1 GDSN data synchronization, and point-of-sale scanning

quality_rules.message: Food products should have at least 2 images (packaging front and nutrition label)
quality_rules.description: Front packaging and nutrition label photos are essential for e-commerce and regulatory compliance

quality_rules.message: Ingredients list should be between 10 and 5000 characters
quality_rules.description: Very short ingredient lists may be incomplete; very long lists may need formatting review

demo_products.description: Premium organic dark chocolate bar with 70% cocoa solids. Single-origin Ecuadorian cacao, stone-ground for smooth texture. Fair Trade certified.

attributes.ingredients: Cocoa mass*, cane sugar*, cocoa butter*, vanilla extract*. *Organic. Cocoa solids: 70% minimum.

demo_products.description: Refreshing sparkling iced tea infused with natural lemon flavor. Brewed from real tea leaves with no artificial sweeteners. Low calorie and lightly carbonated.

attributes.ingredients: Sparkling water, brewed black tea (8%), cane sugar, natural lemon flavor, citric acid, ascorbic acid (vitamin C).

demo_products.description: Thick and creamy Greek-style strained yogurt. High in protein, no added sugar. Made from pasteurized whole milk with live active cultures.

attributes.ingredients: Pasteurized whole milk, live yogurt cultures (Streptococcus thermophilus, Lactobacillus bulgaricus).

demo_products.description: Classic Sriracha-style hot chili sauce made from sun-ripened red jalapeno peppers. Versatile table sauce with balanced heat and garlic flavor.

attributes.ingredients: Red jalapeno chili (68%), sugar, salt, garlic, distilled vinegar, potassium sorbate (preservative), xanthan gum.

demo_products.description: Certified organic Honeycrisp apples, hand-picked at peak ripeness. Sweet and crisp with a balanced acidity. Grown without synthetic pesticides.
